status: PLACEHOLDER — sample corpus for the demo only. NOT cleared by D-1 (AI may speak for FAACT) or D-2 (approved content). Do not deploy.
source: Assembled from already-public, already-approved FAACT site content (diploma names, vision/mission, accreditors, partners, contact). Danger topics deliberately EXCLUDED.
fenceRule: Any question touching a fenced topic must be DEFERRED to a human (WhatsApp). The assistant never states or estimates these.
